name: Barry
description:
Barry is a British soldier encountered in San Sebastián. 
Barry wears the standard uniform for the 5th Regiment of Foot Royal Northumberland Fusiliers. It is unknown what class he is, and he appears to be unarmed.

He can be encountered near the end of San Sebastián as the winch operator of the platform that brings the players down from the fortress. He meets his untimely demise while helping the players, being ambushed by two Zombie Runners before ultimately being blown up by a Bomber, opening the grate, and forcing one of the players to sacrifice themselves to lower the others.
creator: sneaky link
